description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a muscular build, wearing a sleeveless, high-collared top and fitted pants. The character's arms are exposed, showing defined musculature, and both wrists are adorned with fingerless gloves featuring accent details. The figure sports a dramatic, spiked mohawk hairstyle and a face mask that covers the lower half of the face, giving a modern, urban, and slightly futuristic appearance. The footwear consists of high-top sneakers with thick soles and strap details, suitable for active movement. The overall look is accessorized with arm bands and a bold, athletic silhouette, suggesting agility and streetwise confidence.
description: A muscular adult male with a mohawk, face mask, sleeveless top, fitted pants, gloves, and high-top sneakers, styled for an urban, athletic look.
description_view_0: Back view showing the sleeveless top's high collar, exposed arms, and the mohawk's full length.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the mohawk, face mask, and the layered details of the gloves and sneakers.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the face mask, sleeveless top, muscular arms, and the symmetrical design of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the arm bands, glove details, and the angular cut of the top.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless athletic top, fitted pants, fingerless gloves, high-collared neck, arm bands, face mask
